title: onosma estahbanensis
intro: Onosma estahbanensis, also known as Estahban Onosma, is a rare and endemic plant species native to Iran. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to inhibit the growth of certain bacteria and fungi, making it a potential candidate for the development of antibiotics. The health benefits of Onosma estahbanensis include its potential to treat various infections and its antioxidant properties, which can help protect against cell damage and oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of Onosma estahbanensis can be made into teas, infusions, or capsules, but more research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential uses.
